allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('pnpm config:', JSON.stringify\(p.pnpm || {}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(p.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('binary:', json.dumps\(p.get\('binary',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 '__TRACKED_VAR__/Library/Application Support/Archi/archi.db' 'SELECT version, applied_at FROM migrations ORDER BY version')

Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cookies:', len\(d.get\('cookies', []\)\), 'origins:', len\(d.get\('origins', []\)\)\); cookies = d.get\('cookies', []\); now=__import__\('time'\).time\(\); print\('expiring cookies \(sample\):'\); [print\(c['name'], c['domain'], 'expires_in_days:', round\(\(c.get\('expires',-1\)-now\)/86400,1\) if c.get\('expires',-1\)>0 else 'session'\) for c in cookies[:15]]")
